news.t: Defiance Gold Enhanced Options Income ETF (GLDY) Trading Halt
Defiance Gold Enhanced Options Income ETF (GLDY) and Defiance Oil Enhanced Options Income ETF (USOY) Trading Halt
Defiance Launches $GLDY, Gold Enhanced Options Income ETF

overview.description: The Defiance Gold Enhanced Options Income ETF (GOLI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in gold commodities. GLDY is an actively managed fund that employs a put options strategy that emphasizes current income while providing exposure to the price of SPDR Gold Shares (GLD). The underlying fund tracks the gold spot price, less expenses and liabilities, using gold bars held in London vaults GOLI was launched on Apr 1, 2025 and is issued by Defiance.
